items.title: Iran's supreme leader absent as senior officials attend ayatollah's funeral
items.summary: Ali Khamenei's son Mojtaba is conspicuously absent from his father's funeral on Sunday, amid speculation about his condition.

items.title: US marks 250th birthday with fireworks, flyovers and extreme weather
items.summary: US President Donald Trump's speech included some of his political agenda but also honoured war veterans and American history.

items.title: Evacuations in Guam as super typhoon Bavi approaches
items.summary: The storm is forecast to bring winds in excess of 160mph and waves nearly 11m high when it makes landfall on Monday.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 中共21大換屆  紐時：蔡奇扮演習近平人事安排要角
items.summary: 中共總書記習近平在明年中共21大將邁入第4任期，面臨人事安排上的兩難，即如何甄補一批忠誠的新生代官員，還要能保持自己的掌控權力。紐約時報指出，中共中央黨校校長蔡奇將在習近平的用人問題上扮演重...…

items.title: 雙邊關係回溫 以色列任命首任常駐斯洛維尼亞大使

items.title: 伊朗前最高領袖哈米尼國葬 三子出席、接班兒未現身
